name: Classic Pancit Canton with Sunny-Side Egg
alt: Classic Pancit Canton topped with a sunny-side egg
description: Savory stir-cooked Pancit Canton noodles finished with a perfectly cooked sunny-side egg, showcasing balance, texture, and simple yet satisfying flavors.

name: Atay na Adobo
alt: Filipino-style chicken liver adobo served with rice
description: A rich and savory Filipino dish featuring tender chicken liver simmered in vinegar, soy sauce, garlic, and spices, creating a bold and comforting flavor.
